---
title: "hrcbd"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(broom)

hrcbd_sim <- function(blocks,
                     treatments,
                     mu,
                     sigma_b,
                     sigma_e,
                     response_type = "normal") {

  data <- expand.grid(
    block = factor(1:blocks),
    treatment = factor(1:treatments)
  )
  
  mu_tb <- mu
  V_tb <- sigma_b^2 + sigma_e^2

  a <- (1 / sqrt(V_tb)) * sqrt(log(1 + V_tb / mu_tb^2))

  b <- log(mu_tb) - a * mu_tb - (a^2 * V_tb) / 2

  b_j <- rnorm(blocks, 0, sigma_b)

  tau_i <- rep(0, treatments)

  e <- rnorm(nrow(data), 0, sigma_e)

  y1 <- mu_tb + tau_i[data$treatment] + b_j[data$block] + e

  if (response_type == "normal") {
  response <- y1
  } else if (response_type == "lognormal") {
  response <- exp(a * y1 + b)
  } else if (response_type == "log") {
  response <- a * y1 + b
  } else if (response_type == "exp") {
  response <- exp(y1)
  }

  data$response <- response

  model <- aov(response ~ treatment + block, data)
  anova_tbl <- anova(model) |> tidy()

  F_stat <- anova_tbl |>
    filter(term == "treatment") |>
    pull(statistic)
  
  p_value <- anova_tbl |>
    filter(term == "treatment") |>
    pull(p.value)

  reject_F <- p_value < 0.05

  tukey_flag <- TukeyHSD(model, "treatment")$treatment |>
    as.data.frame() |>
    pull(`p adj`) |>
    (\(x) any(x < 0.05))()

  R2 <- summary(lm(response ~ treatment + block, data))$r.squared

  MS_error <- anova_tbl |>
    filter(term == "Residuals") |>
    pull(meansq)

  tibble(
    F_stat = F_stat,
    reject_F = reject_F,
    R2 = R2,
    tukey_reject = tukey_flag,
    MS_error = MS_error
  )
}
```

```{r}
set.seed(100)

results_normal <- map_dfr(1:5000, ~ hrcbd_sim(7, 8, 28.12321, 3.6910, 8.4808, "normal"))

results_lognormal <- map_dfr(1:5000, ~ hrcbd_sim(7, 8, 28.12321, 3.6910, 8.4808, "lognormal"))

results_log <- map_dfr(1:5000, ~ hrcbd_sim(7, 8, 28.12321, 3.6910, 8.4808, "log"))

results_exp <- map_dfr(1:5000, ~ hrcbd_sim(7, 8, 28.12321, 3.6910, 8.4808, "exp"))

results <- bind_rows(
  normal = results_normal,
  lognormal = results_lognormal,
  log = results_log,
  exp = results_exp,
  .id = "dataset"
) |>
  group_by(dataset) |>
  summarise(
    mean_F = mean(F_stat),
    mean_reject = mean(reject_F),
    FWER = mean(tukey_reject),
    mean_R2 = mean(R2),
    mean_MSE = mean(MS_error)
  )
```


```{r}
R2_sim_mu2 <- function(blocks,
                   treatments,
                   mu,
                   beta_b,
                   R2_target,
                   response_type = "normal") {

  data <- expand.grid(
    block = factor(1:blocks),
    treatment = factor(1:treatments)
  )

  alpha_t <- rep(0, treatments)

  S <- treatments * sum((beta_b - mean(beta_b))^2)

  mean_matrix <- outer(
    alpha_t,
    beta_b,
    function(alpha, beta) mu + alpha + beta
  )

  variance_matrix <- mean_matrix^2

  # Vbar <- 1     # constant variance
  Vbar <- mean(variance_matrix)

  A1 <- treatments + blocks - 2
  B1 <- treatments * blocks - 1

  sigma <- sqrt(S * (1 - R2_target) /(Vbar * (R2_target * B1 - A1)))

  mu_tb <- mu + alpha_t[data$treatment] + beta_b[data$block]

  # V_tb <- sigma^2    # constant variance
  V_tb <- mu_tb^2      # variance proportional to mean^2

  # e <- rnorm(nrow(data), 0, sigma)
  e <- rnorm(nrow(data), mean = 0, sd = sigma * sqrt(V_tb))

  y1 <- mu_tb + e

  Var_tb <- sigma^2 * V_tb

  a_tb <- sqrt(log(1 + Var_tb / mu_tb^2)) / sqrt(Var_tb)

  b_tb <- log(mu_tb) - a_tb * mu_tb - (a_tb^2 * Var_tb) / 2

  if (response_type == "normal") {
  response <- y1
  } else if (response_type == "lognormal") {
  response <- exp(a_tb * y1 + b_tb)
  } else if (response_type == "log") {
  response <- a_tb * y1 + b_tb
  } else if (response_type == "exp") {
  response <- exp(y1)
  }

  data$response <- response

  model <- aov(response ~ treatment + block, data)

  treatment_row <- anova(model) |>
    tidy() |>
    filter(term == "treatment")

  F_stat <- treatment_row$statistic
  p_value <- treatment_row$p.value

  reject_F <- p_value < 0.05

  tukey_reject <- TukeyHSD(model, "treatment")$treatment |>
    as.data.frame() |>
    pull(`p adj`) |>
    (\(x) any(x < 0.05))()

  R2 <- summary(lm(response ~ treatment + block, data))$r.squared

  MS_error <- anova_tbl |>
    filter(term == "Residuals") |>
    pull(meansq)

  tibble(
    F_stat = F_stat,
    reject_F = reject_F,
    R2 = R2,
    tukey_reject = tukey_flag,
    MS_error = MS_error
  )
}
```

```{r}
set.seed(100)

beta_b <- c(-5, -3, -1, 0, 1, 3, 5)

R2_target <- 0.5

results_normal1 <- map_dfr(1:10000, ~ R2_sim_mu2(7, 8, 20, beta_b, R2_target, "normal"))

results_lognormal1 <- map_dfr(1:10000, ~ R2_sim_mu2(7, 8, 20, beta_b, R2_target, "lognormal"))

results_log1 <- map_dfr(1:10000, ~ R2_sim_mu2(7, 8, 20, beta_b, R2_target, "log"))

results_exp1 <- map_dfr(1:10000, ~ R2_sim_mu2(7, 8, 20, beta_b, R2_target, "exp"))

results1 <- bind_rows(
  normal = results_normal1,
  lognormal = results_lognormal1,
  log = results_log1,
  exp = results_exp1,
  .id = "dataset"
) |>
  group_by(dataset) |>
  summarise(
    mean_F = mean(F_stat),
    mean_reject = mean(reject_F),
    FWER = mean(tukey_reject),
    mean_R2 = mean(R2),
    mean_MSE = mean(MS_error)
  )
```

```{r}
R2_sim_b2 <- function(blocks,
                   treatments,
                   mu,
                   beta_b,
                   R2_target,
                   response_type = "normal") {

  data <- expand.grid(
    block = factor(1:blocks),
    treatment = factor(1:treatments)
  )

  alpha_t <- rep(0, treatments)

  S <- treatments * sum((beta_b - mean(beta_b))^2)

  variance_matrix <- outer(
    alpha_t,
    beta_b,
    function(alpha, beta) beta^2
  )

  Vbar <- mean(variance_matrix)

  A1 <- treatments + blocks - 2
  B1 <- treatments * blocks - 1

  sigma <- sqrt(S * (1 - R2_target) /(Vbar * (R2_target * B1 - A1)))

  mu_tb <- mu + alpha_t[data$treatment] + beta_b[data$block]

  V_tb <- beta_b[data$block]^2      # variance proportional to beta^2

  e <- rnorm(nrow(data), mean = 0, sd = sigma * sqrt(V_tb))

  y1 <- mu_tb + e

  Var_tb <- sigma^2 * V_tb

  a_tb <- sqrt(log(1 + Var_tb / mu_tb^2)) / sqrt(Var_tb)

  b_tb <- log(mu_tb) - a_tb * mu_tb - (a_tb^2 * Var_tb) / 2

  if (response_type == "normal") {
  response <- y1
  } else if (response_type == "lognormal") {
  response <- exp(a_tb * y1 + b_tb)
  } else if (response_type == "log") {
  response <- a_tb * y1 + b_tb
  } else if (response_type == "exp") {
  response <- exp(y1)
  }

  data$response <- response

  model <- aov(response ~ treatment + block, data)

  treatment_row <- anova(model) |>
    tidy() |>
    filter(term == "treatment")

  F_stat <- treatment_row$statistic
  p_value <- treatment_row$p.value

  reject_F <- p_value < 0.05

  tukey_reject <- TukeyHSD(model, "treatment")$treatment |>
    as.data.frame() |>
    pull(`p adj`) |>
    (\(x) any(x < 0.05))()

  R2 <- summary(lm(response ~ treatment + block, data))$r.squared

  MS_error <- anova_tbl |>
    filter(term == "Residuals") |>
    pull(meansq)

  tibble(
    F_stat = F_stat,
    reject_F = reject_F,
    R2 = R2,
    tukey_reject = tukey_flag,
    MS_error = MS_error
  )
}
```

```{r}
set.seed(100)

beta_b <- c(-5, -3, -1, 0, 1, 3, 5)

R2_target <- 0.5

results_normal2 <- map_dfr(1:10000, ~ R2_sim_b2(7, 8, 20, beta_b, R2_target, "normal"))

results_lognormal2 <- map_dfr(1:10000, ~ R2_sim_b2(7, 8, 20, beta_b, R2_target, "lognormal"))

results_log2 <- map_dfr(1:10000, ~ R2_sim_b2(7, 8, 20, beta_b, R2_target, "log"))

results_exp2 <- map_dfr(1:10000, ~ R2_sim_b2(7, 8, 20, beta_b, R2_target, "exp"))

results2 <- bind_rows(
  normal = results_normal2,
  lognormal = results_lognormal2,
  log = results_log2,
  exp = results_exp2,
  .id = "dataset"
) |>
  group_by(dataset) |>
  summarise(
    mean_F = mean(F_stat),
    mean_reject = mean(reject_F),
    FWER = mean(tukey_reject),
    mean_R2 = mean(R2),
    mean_MSE = mean(MS_error)
  )
```
